title: Documentation knowledge base cleanup and DRY agent instructions
description:
Audit and redesign repository markdown and agent-instruction surfaces so the repo looks cleaner, agent guidance is DRY, and token-efficient documentation is discoverable through metadata-driven progressive disclosure.

The dashboard HTML/TSX documentation under dashboard/app/documentation/ remains separate human-facing content. The agent KB lives under documentation/agent/ as token-efficient markdown with YAML frontmatter, served through the existing plexus.docs.* APIs in the execute_tactus runtime.

Definition of Done:
- Inventory of all markdown/agent-instruction surfaces classified as canonical, pointer, supplemental, generated, or obsolete.
- Documentation KB behavior covered by BDD specs (frontmatter-aware list and get).
- plexus.docs.* backed by a frontmatter-aware repository module rooted at documentation/agent/.
- Canonical agent docs migrated and namespaced under documentation/agent/.
- AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/agents/, skills/, .cursor/rules/ collapsed to thin pointers + current rules.
- Generated root artifacts cleaned/archived; .gitignore updated.
- Focused tests pass (BDD KB feature + execute.py docs unit tests).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: All planned cleanup todos complete on feature/docs-kb-cleanup branch. Audit + behavior story + frontmatter-aware repository + content migration + thin pointers + root cleanup + tests done. 7 BDD scenarios pass, 9 repository unit tests pass, 101 execute_test.py tests pass. Awaiting human review and PR.
